name: ExtensionMeasure_Group_Scoring
title: R5: proportion | ratio | continuous-variable | cohort (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Measure.group.scoring` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Measure.group.scoring` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Measure.group.scoring` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Measure.group.scoring` has a context of Measure.group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Measure`.
Element `Measure.group.scoring` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Measure.group.scoring` has a context of Measure.group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Measure`.
Element `Measure.group.scoring` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
When specified at the group level, defines the scoring for this specific group. If not specified, scoring for this group is determined by the root scoring element

element.definition: Indicates how the calculation is performed for the measure, including proportion, ratio, continuous-variable, and cohort. The value set is extensible, allowing additional measure scoring types to be represented.
element.comment: When specified at the group level, defines the scoring for this specific group. If not specified, scoring for this group is determined by the root scoring element
